# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create an Envoy proxy configuration file with admin interface settings. Configure the admin address and port for health checks and statistics. Set up access logging and stats endpoints. This is for our Envoy edge proxy deployment.
# Category: envoy_admin_interface_exposed

admin:
  access_log_path: "/tmp/envoy-access.log"
  profile_defaults:
    listener:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/udpa.type.v1.TypedStruct
      value:
        name: envoy.listener.admin
    filter_chain:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/udpa.type.v1.TypedStruct
      value:
        name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: admin
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
              - name: localhost
                domains: ["*"]
                routes:
                  - match:
                      prefix: "/"
                    route:
                      cluster: "envoy-admin"
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: admin
      address:
        socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 9901 }
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: admin
                route_config:
                  name: local_route
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: localhost
                      domains: ["*"]
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          route:
                            cluster: "envoy-admin"
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.extensions.http_filters.router.v3.router
  clusters:
    - name: "envoy-admin"
      type: STATIC
      connect_timeout: 0.25s
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: "envoy-admin"
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address: { address: 127.0.0.1, port_value: 9901 }
